title: ononis pusilla var. parviflora
intro: Ononis pusilla var. parviflora, commonly known as dwarf restharrow or small-flowered restharrow, is a flowering plant belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Ononis pusilla var. parviflora include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or topical creams, and is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
